positive: A minimalist, high-contrast emblem designed for apparel. The main subject is a stylized, interconnected constellation formed by abstract geometric lines (like circuit traces or runic patterns), subtly enclosing a single, symmetrical lunar crescent. The composition should be perfectly centered, utilizing a negative space style with strong silhouettes. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, matte gold, and creamy off-white, giving it an ethereal, cosmic feel. Studio lighting, vector quality, intricate line work, perfect symmetry, clean edges, suitable for direct screen printing.
